text.title: Agent On-Call Runbook Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Runbook auto-restarts pods on every alert; outage caused by mass restart.
antipattern.fix: Block writes without tier-2 approval at tool layer.

antipattern.symptom: Post-mortem cannot identify which step ran when; learning lost.
Agent loops on unresolvable alert for 40min; no human ever paged.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires escalation as last step.
